title: GearGuard
description: This mod makes a clean HUD where you can see your current armor equipped and its durability.
body:
This mod adds a clean minimalistic HUD next to your offhand where you can see your armor currently equipped and its durability.

![Armor showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b2f2a4768d42c1997e60602c8c6caef27cfaa22.png)

This mod was originally made for my friend that likes PVP and said this would be useful for him but i decided to release it!
